TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Ratkin Clans faction.

Translations.Comment: Rat-people tribes. 'Rattoidi' emphasizes rat-like nature while maintaining tribal structure.
Organized infantry. Standard militant terminology for organized rat-man troops.
Forced levies. 'Coscritti' emphasizes forced recruitment of rat-men soldiers.
Stealthy infiltrators. Conveys sneaking and skulking behavior.
Sharpshooters. Full descriptor emphasizes technological firearm advantage.
Simple ranged troops. Traditional Italian term for slingers.
Flamethrower troops. Direct translation with dangerous, ominous tone.
Twisted experimental creature. 'Aberrazione' emphasizes unnatural horror of twisted creation.
Elite warriors. 'Alfa' retains gaming terminology indicating dominance within clans.
Masses of vermin. 'Sciami' evokes overwhelming nature of rat swarms.
Ominous bell. 'Perdizione' emphasizes doom and foreboding omen of bell.
Dark magic user. 'Stregone' establishes dark magic theme for clan sorcerers.
Clan leader. Emphasizes tribal hierarchy and cunning, ruthless leadership.
Master spy and assassin. 'Maestro' emphasizes skill and mastery in covert operations behind enemy lines.
